# GitHub discovery checklist

Use this so the repository is easy to find and understand at a glance.

## Repository name

Use **`raglens`** (Settings → General → Repository name) so the URL matches the product.

## About (sidebar)

**Description (one line):**

> RAGLens — multi-agent RAG evaluation on AWS Bedrock Agent Core: LangGraph, Ragas, S3, CloudWatch.

**Website (optional):** link to docs or a demo post if you add one later.

**Topics** (suggested):

`rag` `retrieval-augmented-generation` `amazon-bedrock` `bedrock-agent-core` `langgraph` `ragas` `aws` `python` `llm-evaluation` `fastapi` `s3` `cloudwatch` `machine-learning`

## After renaming the repo

If you previously cloned `TestingAgent`, point `origin` at the new URL:

```bash
git remote set-url origin https://github.com/MaheshSugathan/raglens.git
```

## Social preview (optional)

Settings → General → Social preview — upload a 1280×640 image (logo + “RAGLens · AWS Bedrock”) so links look polished on Twitter/Slack.
